task_completion.description: Read the wing specification document to obtain geometry parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit or nano) or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/wing_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Create a new Wing component in OpenVSP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP application is open, and a 'Wing' component is visible in the Geometry Browser list and the 3D workspace.

task_completion.description: Set the Wing parameters (span, root chord, tip chord, dihedral, sweep) based on the specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP Wing geometry parameter dialog is open (Plan or Section tabs) with the agent actively modifying values for Span, Chord, Sweep, or Dihedral.

task_completion.description: Create a Fuselage (Pod) component to represent the aircraft body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Pod' or 'Fuselage' component is added to the OpenVSP Geometry Browser list and is visible in the 3D workspace alongside the wing.

task_completion.description: Save the completed OpenVSP model to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog showing the path /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/concept_wing.vsp3, or the OpenVSP main window title bar displaying 'concept_wing.vsp3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP graphical user interface to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the OpenVSP GUI (menus, geometry browser, parameter windows) rather than writing a .vsp3 XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the parameters into the OpenVSP application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameter input fields in the OpenVSP geometry dialogs are seen being edited, proving the agent didn't just load a pre-made model.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP File -> Save or Save As menu is used, rather than a terminal command moving or copying a pre-existing file to the target location.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires saving the OpenVSP model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/concept_wing.vsp3. The final evaluation script exports the result to /tmp/openvsp_concept_wing_result.json.
